reviews.review_title: Some thing I think they should add
reviews.review_description: I think that u should add beach.and public lobby’s then I would play the game way more but I like how it is and stuff

So I just started my career as a gtag yt but idk how to download camera mod without pc, so what did I do?Well I downloaded restart tag!With restart tag, I can easily access camera mod without having to follow all the steps.Overall I love the game, really underrated as it’s totally worth it to test out if camera mod or cosmetic mods, whatever you need.However there is a downside as they don’t have any mod but maybe there will be new mods added soon.Just mentioning that bc it actually doesn’t have cosmetic mod.But however I assure you that by the time that it,s released bc it’s probably not gonna have every mod with the amount new mods released every year.(which I’m pretty sure is a-lot,Idk man)would give 4.5 stars but I can’t do star and a half ratings on my current device so In total 4 stars,for the developer just know that you don’t have to add every mod in gtag history, just try to keep the maps updated so that  I can record camera mod more easily in some vids about new apps and yeah.
I love this game lot it is super fun five star
